expected_effect: Lift weak calm slices without leaving the book cheap continuously.
expected_failure_signature: If calm credits refill too easily, the book drifts into the same broad cheapening and arb leakage as the weak-slice envelope line.
expected_win_condition: Target low-retail and low-decile improvement without changing the incumbent defensive floor.
hidden_coupling_removed: Calm relief is granted by the same contemporaneous signals that decide broad protection, so spend persists longer than evidence supports.
rationale: Make calm competitiveness an earned and depleting budget that accumulates only after repeated benign confirmations and can be spent only in short windows.
title: Earned calm-credit ledger
why_not_coefficient_retune: This changes how opportunity spend is accrued and exhausted instead of softening thresholds on the same overlay.
